overview: Assemble a specific set of cards that wins the game on the spot or generates an insurmountable advantage. The deck is built to find and protect those pieces. Race linear opponents, and play around interaction against decks that can disrupt you.
win_conditions: Execute the combo to win immediately or near-immediately
Generate an unbeatable engine the opponent cannot interact with in time

keep_criteria: A hand that finds or advances the combo within a reasonable number of turns
Enough lands and mana to actually execute the combo
Card selection or tutors that dig toward the missing pieces
mulligan_criteria: No combo pieces and no way to dig for them
Combo pieces but not enough mana to ever cast them
A hand that is far too slow against an open, aggressive field

examples.reason: One combo piece plus a tutor and lands reliably assembles the kill.
All lands and no combo pieces or card selection does nothing.

early_game: Develop mana and dig toward your combo pieces with card selection
Deploy cheap disruption against decks that can interact with you
Do not telegraph the combo — hold pieces until you can win
mid_game: Assemble the combo on a turn you can also protect it, if possible
Bait or strip the opponent's interaction before going off
Track whether you are racing — go off as soon as it is safe
late_game: If forced long, win through remaining disruption on the cleanest turn
Do not wait for perfection against a faster clock — execute and win

key_cards.name: Combo pieces
key_cards.notes: The cards that win the game; protect them and do not expose them early.

key_cards.name: Tutors / card selection
key_cards.notes: Dig toward the missing half of the combo as fast as possible.

key_cards.name: Disruption
key_cards.notes: Discard or counters that clear the opponent's interaction before you go off.

sequencing_tips: Cast card selection early to find pieces, but keep the actual combo hidden
Strip interaction with discard before committing to the combo turn
Count mana precisely — know exactly which turn you can win

matchups.advice: Bait counterspells with lesser spells, or use discard, then combo into open mana.
You are racing — mulligan for speed and combo as fast as possible.
watch_for: reach / burn that beats you to the kill

common_threats: Counterspells and discard that break up the combo
Fast aggro that kills before you assemble the pieces
Hate cards that shut off your specific combo
